title: Crop Critters
description: An overhaul to vanilla farming, adding weeds and animated crops to help or hinder your farming adventure!
body:
![CropCrittersBanner](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/58ef9d31ff272591bb9d7be78fb1ef0542eeb352.png) **Tired of uneventful vanilla farming?
Crop Critters adds all-new levels of challenge,
from basic weed management to constructing a friendly
team of soul-possesed crops to work on your farm!** # [WIKI](https://cropcritters.wiki.gg/)
## Features - Lost Souls can bring crops to life. Each crop critter can help your farm or be a nuisance to take care of - Also lets you bring life back to slime blocks - Weeds can grow and take over your farm. Different soils, biomes, and events can result in different weeds with unique effects - The Lost Soul in a Bottle can help you know when weeds have appeared nearby - Bushes can be grown and trimmed - Strange fertilizer can revive coral and grow randoms plants - Seed Balls can help plant fields faster, or be used as a weapon - Crafting the seed ball with different seeds lets you choose what to plant - Poisonous potatoes add poison to the ball - The Soul Rose, a multi-block with 3 unique powerful effects - Crops suck nutrients from the ground when they mature - Crops can be placed on most normal plant-friendly blocks If you are a modpack maker, the mod should work with other farming mods, and most functionality uses tags that can be extended as needed. NOTE: There is a minor graphical issue with some shaders (BSL & Bliss) ## Credits [Josh/Joosh](https://sites.google.com/view/jooshportfolio/home?authuser=0) - Models & Animations
[Fritz](https://x.com/Blissful_Elwyn) - Textures
[Bee](https://everloste.github.io/) - 1.1.0 Textures
Yelf42 - Code
